names.zh-Hans: 数字游民 / 远程工作

description.en: Routes for remote workers earning income outside the destination country.
description.zh-Hans: 面向收入来自目的地国家以外的远程工作者的路径。

description.en: Employment, occupation-list, and points-based skilled migration routes.
description.zh-Hans: 就业、职业清单和打分制相关的技术移民路径。

description.en: Education pathways that may lead to work authorization and permanent residence.
description.zh-Hans: 可能衔接工作许可和永居的教育路径。

description.en: Founder, startup, innovation, and entrepreneur routes.
description.zh-Hans: 创始人、初创、创新和企业家路径。

description.en: Residence or citizenship routes connected to investment, funds, or business creation.
description.zh-Hans: 与投资、资金或企业创建相关的居留或公民身份路径。
